base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bosses_atlas — a character (final_boss) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Boss atlas — 4 Elemental Archfiends (Scarmiglione/Cagnazzo/Barbariccia/Rubicante) + Lunar-arc bosses (CPU/Demon Wall/4-Crystals/Zeromus final). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Boss atlas — 4 Elemental Archfiends (Scarmiglione/Cagnazzo/Barbariccia/Rubicante) + Lunar-arc bosses (CPU/Demon Wall/4-Crystals/Zeromus final)
